opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This hard lump on my hand has been growing for weeks and throbbing, and today it just burst open and won't stop bleeding.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A rapidly growing painful lump on the back of my hand burst open today and is bleeding heavily.

symptom_narrative.onset: a lump growing over ~6 weeks from a pre-existing rough sun spot; burst/bleeding today
symptom_narrative.character: firm hard lump with thick scale, now ulcerated and bleeding
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: painful, throbbing, heavy bleeding staff can't stop
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thick scale detached leaving a raw ulcer; deep hard lump; a lump felt in the armpit; no fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: a flat rough sun spot was there before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: frail, uses a walking frame; anxious about bleeding

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: atrial fibrillation on a blood thinner
lots of sun damage; a pre-existing rough spot at the site

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: apixaban (blood thinner) for my heart rhythm

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: aged-care resident; heavy past sun exposure

objective_data_offered.value: a ~2.5cm firm, hard lump on the back of the hand with a deep ulcerated crusted centre that is oozing blood, and a thick scale partly attached; feels hard/tethered; a firm lump can be felt in the armpit
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: nurse/camera description; cannot palpate induration/nodes or dermoscope

objective_data_offered.value: oozing venous blood, soaking gauze; slows with firm pressure but staff couldn't fully stop it
